data.content: Shipment review gate: REJECTED (deployment_issue). Commit a502fa2c424f is tagged on the knot but remains on branch knots-040c-loom-prompt-coverage - it has NOT been merged or pushed to origin/main. The remote_main output mode requires 'Change is live on main branch'. origin/main is at 8c2747f. Returning to ready_for_shipment so the shipment step can merge the branch to main and push.
